name: bandit.mixed_signal_coexistence_mcw
description: Challenge B for CAOL-MULTI-CAMP-SIGNAL-GAUNTLET-v0: a live smoke/fire source near the player pulls one clean camp by candidate_reason=live_signal while a second clean camp outside signal range carries and runs a structural_bounty lead. The proof is same-run live maintenance under bounded wait, not fixture/setup presence.

steps.label: post_load_mixed_signal_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the mixed structural/live-signal fixture; this is only startup/load footing before bounded wait

steps.label: preflight_saved_live_fire_smoke_source
steps.abort_reason: saved mixed-signal fixture lacks the live fd_fire/fd_smoke source near the player before bounded wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved map metadata contains live smoke/fire fields near the player before signal maintenance runs

steps.label: preflight_mixed_signal_live_camp
steps.abort_reason: live-signal camp is missing or not clean before mixed-signal wait

steps.label: preflight_mixed_signal_structural_camp
steps.abort_reason: separate structural camp does not carry the intended structural-bounty lead before mixed-signal wait

steps.label: audit_saved_turn_before_mixed_signal_wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved player turn baseline is recorded before bounded mixed-signal wait

steps.label: wait_30_minutes_for_structural_and_live_signal_coexistence
steps.expected_visible_fact: real wait UI is opened, Wait a while is chosen, 30 minutes is selected, and same-run artifacts must show one live-signal dispatch plus one separate structural dispatch; survivor-spotted interruptions may be ignored only through captured I-response rows
steps.failure_rule: If candidate_reason is direct_player_range instead of live_signal, if the structural camp does not dispatch its structural bounty, or if artifacts only prove setup/load, Challenge B is not green.

steps.label: open_save_quit_prompt_after_mixed_signal
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit prompt is visible after the mixed-signal coexistence wait or after captured wait-interruption handling

steps.label: confirm_save_quit_after_mixed_signal
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit confirmation completed after the mixed-signal coexistence wait

steps.label: audit_saved_turn_after_mixed_signal_wait
steps.abort_reason: saved turn did not advance after bounded mixed-signal wait/save; time passage is not proven

steps.label: audit_saved_structural_site_survives_mixed_signal
steps.abort_reason: after mixed-signal wait/save the separate structural site is missing

steps.label: audit_saved_live_site_survives_mixed_signal
steps.abort_reason: after mixed-signal wait/save the live-signal site is missing

steps.label: audit_mixed_signal_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not show both live-signal candidate handling and separate structural-bounty maintenance

evidence_contract.claim: structural bounty and live smoke/fire signal handling coexist in one bounded live run: the signal camp chooses candidate_reason=live_signal, the separate structural camp dispatches its structural bounty, both site classes survive save/writeback, and compact perf/log counters remain visible
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for mixed-signal coexistence
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No Challenge B credit if startup/load, saved fire/smoke source, clean live and structural camp preflights, bounded wait, live_signal candidate artifacts, structural artifacts, save/writeback, and persisted site-state checks are not all present.
